sourceMovie.title: Patriots Day
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Patriots Day (2016) stuck because it commits to its action premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Peter Berg's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Jack Reacher
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Patriots Day clicked for you, Jack Reacher (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Patriots Day?
faq.answer: Try Jack Reacher, The Siege, The Departed—each shares DNA with Patriots Day while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Patriots Day?
faq.answer: Patriots Day (2016) is best described as Action, Crime, Drama, History, Thriller. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Patriots Day worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
